title: Life feels heavy — money tight, dad sick, mom at Olive Garden, walk with God's eyes
html:
Life feels heavy — money tight, dad sick, mom at Olive Garden, walk with God's eyes

Source: 2025-03-15 Apple Note. One paragraph, no breaks, written ~2 weeks after the Peacock Bar incident. The most concentrated emotional-weather note in the 2025 corpus — and a textbook example of Yahir using the manifesto-style ending to pull himself out of the dip. The dip itself sits inside post china limbo, the nine-month bridge chapter between Shanghai and Austin.

TL;DR

  • Opens in despair: "life has felt very heavy recently and these are type of moments. That'll get people to just stop living. This is what life feels like every fucking action you know"
  • The triggers stacked: money tight, "push protein but I feel like I'm just on a treadmill", dad getting better but he'll relax because nothing has changed, mom still at Olive Garden + birthing her dad's care ("birthing" — typo for "burying"? she's caring for grandpa).
  • Mid-paragraph breakdown: "is building protein gonna fucking change anything I don't get my mom out of Olive Garden change and get her home and change anything probably not life always feel this way."
  • Then the manifesto-pivot: "I need to be more grateful. I need to see the different perspectives good things. Yes there's some shitty things but More things are good than bad. Don't let the moment escape you... breathe push beyond never forget you, son of a bitch you walk with God's eyes internal fire that burns stronger for everybody, peel it and embrace it here for it don't let people diminish it let it shine."
  • Same vocabulary as the Shanghai manifesto — "walk with God's eyes," "internal flame," "let it shine." Six months apart, same self-talk lexicon.

Pattern observed

Classic dip-and-pivot note: the paragraph format (no breaks) is the form-mirroring-the-feel — the avalanche of weight gets released, then the manifesto-language kicks in to climb out. Identical structure shows up in 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void (almost a year later, same vocabulary, more confident voice).

The mention of Brotein as "push protein" (the WeRun group context?) shows it was active and felt insufficient as a meaning-source by March 2025 — important context for why Brotein eventually backseats to Rankett.

Key quote

"I need to crack through something out of building protein is gonna fucking change anything"

Open questions

  • The mom-at-Olive-Garden line — was she still working there in 2026? Did Yahir ever buy her out of that job?
  • Dad "getting better" — what was he recovering from? (Implied: alcoholism per 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad on deathbed vibe.)

Related

  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever — same vocabulary, brighter context
  • 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void — same dip-and-pivot pattern, more confident voice
